message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[0, 1, 0], [0, 2, 0], [1, 3, 0], [0, 1, 1], [0, 4, 1], [1, 5, 1], [2, 6, 0], [4, 7, 1]]"],"focus":"Physical road present in multiple layers that is a bridge in each layer (road [0,1] should be layer-bridging); tests multi-layer bridge detection and per-layer articulation identification across small disjoint components."},{"input_lines":["[[-1, 0, 0], [0, 1, 0], [-1, 1, 1], [-1, -1, 2], [1, 2, 2], [2, 3, 2], [1, 3, 2], [1, 2, 2]]"],"focus":"Negative node ids, self-loop, and duplicate edge entries in the same layer; checks handling of signed ids, self-loops that should not affect connectivity, and duplicate instances."},{"input_lines":["[[0, 1, 0], [1, 2, 0], [2, 0, 0], [2, 3, 0], [0, 1, 1], [1, 2, 2], [2, 3, 2], [3, 4, 2], [4, 5, 2], [2, 3, 3]]"],"focus":"Multi-layer chain where the same physical road ([2,3]) appears in three layers and is a bridge in multiple layers; verifies aggregation of affected layers per physical road and canonical sorting of outputs."}]}
